response.original_title: Kuerz & Knackeg VOL. 2: Meet the Lovers
response.overview: Dive into a sun-drenched celebration of love in all its forms with KUERZ & KNACKEG: SHORTFILMS MADE IN LUXEMBOURG – VOLUME 2: MEET THE LOVERS, curated by yours truly LARS and Cinextdoor.  This second edition of our short film program, dedicated to Luxembourgish talent, invites you to laugh, sigh, and maybe even shed a tear as it explores the highs of romance, the pangs of heartbreak, and the quirks of human connection. From whimsical encounters to raw emotional battles, these five local short films—told in Luxembourgish, English, French, Spanish, and German (all shown with english subs)—capture the universal language of love.  SUPERHERO by Emile V. Schlesser (2020) AND HE SAID YES by Gintare Parulyte (2022) NUCLEAIRE by Roxanne Peguet (2022) TOI AUSSI CA TE CHATOUILLE by Lucia Valverde (2019) WAT DENG AEN MIR SOEN by Alexandra Kurt and Joshua Thil (2025)
response.title: Kuerz & Knackeg VOL. 2: Meet the Lovers
